description: CompositionPurple knit pullover made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed mock collar with a zippered chest placket, panel stitch on the shoulders and upper back, brand name embroidered on the upper left chest and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careWash in water below 30 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoUpdate your casual style with this dark mahogany purple knit pullover from adidas. The simple design is given strong brand appeal with the use of the iconic three stripes on the sleeves and the embroidered brand name on the upper left chest, while the fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day. Team this pullover with jeans, tees and sneakers for a cool look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
